node.name: Dependency & Flow Mapping
node.objective: Map current structure: dependencies, data flows, entry/exit points, what calls what

node.name: Security Audit
node.objective: OWASP Top 10 review; authentication, authorization, input validation, secrets, injection risks

node.name: Scalability & Performance
node.objective: Bottlenecks, N+1 queries, blocking I/O, memory leaks, inefficient algorithms, caching gaps

node.name: Architecture & Maintainability
node.objective: Separation of concerns, coupling, testability, naming, dead code, abstraction leaks

node.name: Refactor Plan (Priority Ordered)
node.objective: Prioritized list of changes: what MUST happen before what. Security fixes before performance. Architecture before new features. Flag any changes that conflict across audit branches and resolve.

node.name: Test Strategy
node.objective: What tests are needed, in what order, to validate the refactor safely

node.name: Code Generation
node.objective: Write the refactored code, implementing plan from node 5, testable per node 6

node.name: Edge Case & Regression Check
node.objective: Review generated code for: edge cases missed, regressions introduced, deviations from the plan, and any new issues created. Produce diff summary and confidence score.
